name: Robin CycBar 15X

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A0520844-B27D-4B12-936E-0E66995DF865

comment: CycBar 15X™ is a lightweight static IP65 rated 1.000 mm linear bar which uses 15 equally spaced new generation of 30% brighter 15W RGBW multichip LEDs for enhanced 18-bit smooth colour mixing and linear dimming without RGB ’breakup’ or grey shadows.

capabilities.comment: PWM output frequency of LEDs: Standard (300Hz)
PWM output frequency of LEDs: High (600Hz)
Speed without fade time Max (op direction)
Speed without fade time Min (op direction)
Speed with fade time Max (op direction)
Speed with fade time Min (op direction)
Random strobe from slow to fast

modes.name: Mode 5 - Extended 16 - bit + RGB pixels + LED Frequency setting

gwSpecs.description: CycBar 15X™ is a lightweight static IP65 rated 1.000 mm linear bar which uses 15 equally spaced new generation of 30% brighter 15W RGBW multichip LEDs for enhanced 18-bit smooth colour mixing and linear dimming without RGB ’breakup’ or grey shadows.
